title: NASA Hubble Space Telescope
description: A NASA source card about Hubble observations, missions, and astronomy evidence.
license: Public Domain / NASA Media Usage Guidelines

pages.text: NASA Hubble resources introduce a major space telescope that has observed planets, stars, nebulae, galaxies, expansion, and deep fields across decades.
Use this source for visual evidence reading, scientific timelines, and comparison between different telescope missions.
NASA materials are generally public domain as U.S. government work, but some images, partner resources, insignia, and logos have separate usage rules. Check item-level rights.
